technologies.name: Amazon CloudWatch
technologies.evidence: As an Amazon Web Services Advanced Services Partner, with the AWS Cloud Operations Competency in Monitoring and Observability, Crest Data delivers enterprise-grade Amazon CloudWatch services and strategic AWS CloudWatch solutions across complex cloud ecosystems.
technologies.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions Amazon CloudWatch as a key service provided by Crest Data for observability and monitoring.

technologies.name: Datadog
technologies.evidence: Deep experience delivering CloudWatch integration services across AWS, Azure, GCP, Datadog, Dynatrace, Splunk, Elastic, QRadar, and other leading observability and security platforms.
technologies.reasoning: The text mentions Datadog as one of the observability platforms Crest Data integrates with.
